description: Complete laboratory test catalogue. The single root 1271 (Tests ordered) is CIEL's canonical entry point for all orderable lab investigations — it cascades to the full set of ~718 test concepts including CBC, HIV, malaria, renal, liver, TB, urinalysis, radiology orders, and all associated LabSet panels. The gateway delivers only the subset the hospital's tier/modules require.

notes.1271: Tests ordered (ConvSet) — CIEL's top-level root for all orderable investigations. Cascades to ~718 concepts covering haematology, chemistry, serology, microbiology, urinalysis, radiology orders, and all nested LabSet panels (CBC, CD4, metabolic, etc.)
